subcodes.first_line: O daughters of the Kingdom of God! Praise be to God that ye are occupied in the acquisition of perfection and are devoted night and day to the study of teaching [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @rational arguments, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
